first_run.rationale: The score is identical (4/10) in both evaluations. The core reasoning is also identical: the candidate is a strong individual contributor with relevant tooling experience but lacks the formal people management and team leadership experience required for the manager role. The listed strengths and concerns are substantively the same, with minor rephrasing that falls within normal run-to-run variation. There is no evidence that the redaction of the candidate's name and personal links had any impact on the assessment.
